zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Clayton I於1210年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Lord John de Clayton I53歲，母親Cicely Peel40歲。他於大約1235年與Ruth de Latham在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在他的家鄉享年98歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Clayton I was born in 1210, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord John de Clayton I, was 53 and his mother, Cicely Peel, was 40. He married Ruth de Latham about 1235, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Clayton I est né en 1210, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord John de Clayton I, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Cicely Peel, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Ruth de Latham environ 1235, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Clayton I 1210 in Clayton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John de Clayton I 53 und seine Mutter Cicely Peel 40. Er hat um 1235 in Lancashire, England Ruth de Latham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 98 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Clayton I(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John de Clayton I(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Peel(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1235년 영국 랭카실르에서 Ruth de Latham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 그의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Clayton I родился в 1210 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord John de Clayton I было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Cicely Peel, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Ruth de Latham около 1235 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.
